Class StorePermission

java.lang.Object
user.StorePermission
public class StorePermission extends Object
It implements the store permission of the store
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • StorePermission

      public StorePermission()
      Constructor of the class

  • Method Details

    • addComic

      public void addComic(double price, String name, String description, String photo, int stock, int numPages, Year year, String author, String editorial, Category... categories)
      Adds a new comic to the store
      Parameters:
      price - , price of the comic
      name - , name of the comic to add
      description - , description of the comic
      photo - , link of the photo
      stock - , number of items available on the store
      numPages - , number of pages of the comic
      year - , the year it was published
      author - the comic's author
      editorial - , the editorial that edited the comic
      categories - , all the categories it belongs too

    • addGame

      public void addGame(double price, String name, String description, String photo, int stock, int numPlayers, String ageRange, GameStyle gameStyle, Category... categories)
      Adds a new game to the store
      Parameters:
      price - , price of the comic
      name - , name of the comic to add
      description - , description of the comic
      photo - , link of the photo
      stock - , number of items available on the store
      numPlayers - , number of players the game allows
      ageRange - , the ages allowed to play this game
      gameStyle - , game style of said game
      categories - , all the categories it belongs too

    • addFigurine

      public void addFigurine(double price, String name, String description, String photo, int stock, String dimensions, String brand, String material, Category... categories)
      Adds a new figurine to the store
      Parameters:
      price - , price of the comic
      name - , name of the comic to add
      description - , description of the comic
      photo - , link of the photo
      stock - , number of items available on the store
      dimensions - , the values of the dimensiones of the figurine (height x width x depth)
      brand - , brand it belongs to
      material - , material of the figurine
      categories - , all the categories it belongs too

    • addProductByFile

      public boolean addProductByFile(String fileName) throws IOException
      Adds new products to the store reading them from a file
      Parameters:
      fileName - , name of the file that contains the products
      Returns:
      true if the products were added false if else
      Throws:
      IOException - error while reading the file

    • addPack

      public void addPack(double price, ArrayList<StoreProduct> products, LocalDate date)
      Adds a new pack to the store
      Parameters:
      price - , price of the pack
      products - , list of products that the pack contains
      date - , date when the pack was created

    • getStore

      public Store getStore()
      Gets the store instance
      Returns:
      the store
